ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being monitored */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the metric (Basic or Server) */,
  "default_monitoring_mode" TEXT /* Default monitoring mode for this metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The data type of the metric value */,
  "is_aggregatable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the metric can be aggregated */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* The type of aggregation used for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system (e.g., Windows, Linux) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device being monitored */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or logical location of the device */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating system of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., router, switch, firewall) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* The last time the device was seen (last data collection) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being collected */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device from which data is collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* The collected value for the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the collected metric value */,
  "is_anomalous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the data point is considered anomalous */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Score indicating the level of anomaly (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring mode (e.g., Basic, Advanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the monitoring mode */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected in this mode */,
  "data_retention" TEXT /* Duration for which data is retained in this mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert configuration */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that this alert is associated with */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification for the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert remains active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* The last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report generated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, traffic, security) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Time period covered by the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, archived) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated metric */,
  "warning_threshold" REAL /* Warning threshold value */,
  "critical_threshold" REAL /* Critical threshold value */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the threshold should be exceeded before triggering an alert */,
  "is_dynamic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the threshold is dynamic */,
  "dynamic_threshold_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the dynamic threshold (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
